description: Extend the frontend API client (qi-webapp/js/api.js) with all new endpoint methods, and extend store.js mode='api' sync to cover project/register/snapshot mutations.
steps: Extend qi-webapp/js/api.js with new methods on the QIAPI object: listProjects(), createProject(data), updateProject(id, data), deleteProject(id), listRegisters(type, projectId), createRegister(type, data), updateRegister(type, id, data), deleteRegister(type, id), listSnapshots(projectId), createSnapshot(data), restoreSnapshot(id), deleteSnapshot(id), createShareToken(data), listShareTokens(projectId), revokeShareToken(id), changePassword(currentPassword, newPassword). Each method calls the request() helper with the appropriate HTTP method and path.

Extend qi-webapp/js/store.js mode='api' sync: Wrap addProject, deleteProject, renameProject with the same pattern used for cases (call local function first, then fire-and-forget API call with .catch for error toast). Similarly wrap regAdd, regUpdate, regDelete, takeSnapshot, deleteSnapshot, restoreSnapshot.
Ensure the existing smoke.js (199 tests) and api.test.js (54 tests) still pass by running them with node
acceptance_criteria: QIAPI.listProjects, createProject, updateProject, deleteProject exist and call correct endpoints
Store.js wraps project/register/snapshot mutations with API sync in mode='api'
verification: Run `cd qi-webapp && node smoke.js` and confirm 199/199 pass
Run `cd qi-webapp && node api.test.js` and confirm 54/54 pass
